things.name: Torres del Paine National Park
things.description: Patagonia's crown jewel - granite towers, glaciers and pumas in UNESCO World Heritage park

things.name: Penguin Colony at Isla Magdalena
things.description: Ferry to an island with 120,000 Magellanic penguins breeding October-March

things.name: Strait of Magellan
things.description: Walk the shore of the strait Magellan navigated in 1520 connecting two oceans

things.name: Museo Regional de Magallanes
things.description: History of Patagonia from the indigenous Selknam and Yaghan people

things.name: Cemetery of Punta Arenas
things.description: Monumental cemetery with elaborate tombs of pioneering families

things.name: Cape Horn (Cabo de Hornos)
things.description: Cruise to the southernmost point of the Americas - the most feared cape in the world

things.name: Tierra del Fuego National Park
things.description: End-of-the-world park with beavers, condors and the southernmost railway

things.name: Cueva del Milodon
things.description: Cave where the remains of a giant ground sloth were discovered in 1895

things.name: Antarctic Cruise Departure
things.description: Punta Arenas is the gateway to Antarctica - king penguin and iceberg cruises

things.name: Patagonian Lamb (Cordero Asado)
things.description: Whole Patagonian lamb roasted on a cross over an open wood fire
